revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''5-2-210

For a closed loop system, the function obtained by taking the ratio of the Laplace transform of the return signal to the Laplace transform of its actuating signal.

Reference: ANSI (modified)

{{IALAFooter}}
